evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensure solutions are scalable, robust and cost efficient, with quality as the basic principle; Define and maintain data quality checks; identify gaps or inconsistencies; translation of requirements with rigor
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: quality as basic principle, data quality checks, gap identification, and robustness dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: telecom infrastructure company; large-scale data foundation; no explicit financial/regulatory signal
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: enterprise data platform role without explicit financial/regulatory consequence; operational quality concern secondary.
evidence.collaboration_width: Data Product Managers; Data Architects; Tech Leads; external Data Engineers
evidence.data_team_maturity: Large-scale data environment; Data Foundations teams; exploring and building Agentic AI solutions
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: established large-scale data function with expanding AI capabilities; teams growing and evolving.
evidence.jd_authorship: Translate requirements into solution designs and end-to-end data flows; Perform Source-to-target analyses (S2T); Explore, build and maintain Agentic AI solutions; Define and maintain data quality checks; Collaborate with Data Engineers during delivery
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific ownership of solution design, S2T analysis, AI solution building, and quality definition shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Data Product Managers; stakeholders; business processes; data foundations infrastructure
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data platform foundation and infrastructure supporting internal data/AI teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: Translate requirements; Perform analyses; Explore and build solutions; Define and maintain quality; Guide external engineers; Challenge stakeholders
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: candidate translates business requirements into technical solutions, owns S2T analysis, and guides external delivery.
evidence.ai_role: Explore, build and maintain Agentic AI solutions; Perform Source-to-target analyses using Agentic AI; familiar with or strongly interested in AI Agents
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI user: candidate expected to explore and build agentic AI solutions for data workflows and analysis automation.
evidence.testing_framing: Define and maintain data quality checks of clear, reusable documentation; with quality as the basic principle
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality ownership framed as core principle and responsibility for defining/maintaining checks.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Ensure solutions are scalable, robust and cost efficient, with quality as the basic principle; Define and maintain data quality checks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: quality and robustness concern secondary to solution design and delivery effectiveness.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Translate requirements into solution designs; Perform S2T analyses; Explore and build Agentic AI solutions; Ensure solutions are scalable, robust
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mixed: both designing new data solutions and maintaining existing data foundations; exploration of new AI capabilities.
evidence.language_gate: Fluent in English or Dutch required
evidence.loss_aversion: Ensure solutions are scalable, robust and cost efficient, with quality as the basic principle. Define and maintain data quality checks.
